ogTitle: Ranceby vs Rathscar West: Climate Safety

heading: Ranceby vs Rathscar West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ranceby, Victoria and Rathscar West, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ranceby has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Rathscar West (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ranceby or Rathscar West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ranceby has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Rathscar West scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ranceby scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Rathscar West scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ranceby or Rathscar West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ranceby has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
